ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "mcc" INTEGER /* Mobile Country Code (MCC) of the network */,
  "mnc" INTEGER /* Mobile Network Code (MNC) of the network */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the network operates */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the network operator */,
  "network_status" TEXT /* Current status of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was last modified */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the network's main location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the network's main location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the network operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_numbers" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service number */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the service number is associated with */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Service number (e.g., 911, 112) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., emergency, special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service number */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the service number was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the service number was last modified */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the service number is active */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_numbers_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ims_addresses" (
  "ims_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IMS address */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service number the IMS address is associated with */,
  "ims_address" TEXT /* IP Multimedia Subsystem (IMS) address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IMS address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the IMS address */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the IMS address was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the IMS address was last modified */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the IMS address is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ims_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ims_addresses_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_numbers ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_provisioning" (
  "provision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisioning event */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being provisioned */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the service is provisioned on */,
  "provision_status" TEXT /* Status of the provisioning (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "provision_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was provisioned */,
  "provision_type" TEXT /* Type of provisioning (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "provisioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provisioned the service */,
  "provision_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the provisioning */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the provisioning is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provisioning_provisioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("provisioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provisioning_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_provisioning_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_numbers ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the service */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., call, message) */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., voice, video) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the service was used on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the service was used */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_numbers ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., call_success_rate, latency) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., call, data) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the metric was recorded */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
